channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump and Xi Agree Strait of Hormuz Must Remain Open
item.description: President Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping met in Beijing and agreed that the Strait of Hormuz must remain open for energy shipments, while Xi warned that Taiwan differences could lead to conflict. The summit addressed Iran war impacts on global oil flows.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Xi Warns Trump Taiwan Differences Could Lead to Clash
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping told President Trump that Taiwan is the most important issue between their nations, warning that mishandling it could lead to conflict. Xi emphasized Taiwan independence and cross-Strait peace are irreconcilable.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskyy Former Chief of Staff Yermak Arrested on Money-Laundering Charges
item.description: Andriy Yermak, former chief of staff to President Zelenskyy, was taken into custody on money-laundering charges related to a $10.5 million scheme through an elite housing development. The case is part of a broader anti-corruption operation.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia unleashes largest wartime aerial assault with 1,500+ drones over two days
item.description: Russia carried out its largest aerial attack over a two-day period since the war began, pounding Kyiv and other cities with hundreds of drones. Ukrainian officials reported widespread destruction and casualties.

item.title: ⚖️ Zelenskiy ex-chief of staff arrested in widening Ukraine corruption probe
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskiy's former right-hand man was taken into custody on money-laundering charges, part of a fight against graft that is fuelling wartime political tensions.

item.title: 🚢 New ship attacks near Strait of Hormuz as Trump-Xi summit stalls on Iran
item.description: New attacks on vessels near the Strait of Hormuz brought a reminder of the costs of a prolonged stalemate, with peace talks stalled and President Trump in Beijing discussing Iran with Xi.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin to visit China soon as Russia deepens ties amid Iran war
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin will visit China very soon, the Kremlin said, as preparations for the trip are already complete amid ongoing global tensions over the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe Fears Putin May Exploit US Distraction in Middle East
item.description: NATO officials express concern that Russia sees a window of opportunity while US attention is focused on the Iran conflict, potentially testing alliance resolve in Eastern Europe.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Belgian Defense Minister Praises Turkish Defense Industry
item.description: Belgium defense chief calls Turkiye a model to follow in defense production, highlighting the growing prominence of Turkish defense exports and technology in European security discussions.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Slashes 2026 Global Oil Demand Growth Forecast
item.description: The cartel lowered its demand growth projections as the Iran war creates uncertainty in energy markets, signaling potential production adjustments ahead.

item.title: 🇮🇳🛢️ India Seeks Russian Oil Waiver Extension from US
item.description: India has asked the US to extend its waiver on Russian oil imports as the Iran war disrupts Persian Gulf energy supplies, Bloomberg News reported.

item.title: 🇮🇳💰 India Considers Tax Cuts on Foreign Bond Investments
item.description: India is considering significant reductions in taxes paid by foreign investors on bonds as authorities seek to align policies with global norms and attract inflows.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Xi Hails New Positioning in US-China Relations
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping praised a "new positioning" of ties with the US that envisages cooperation with measured competition following his summit with Trump.

item.title: 🇨🇺⚡ Cuba runs out of diesel and fuel oil as US blockade squeezes supply
item.description: Cuba Energy Minister Vicente de la O Levy announced the country has completely run out of diesel and fuel oil, with Havana facing 20-22 hour blackouts. The US has offered $6m in aid in exchange for reforms to the communist system.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Republican Senator Murkowski breaks with Trump on Iran war
item.description: Senator Lisa Murkowski voted against the Iran war for the first time, joining Republicans Susan Collins and Rand Paul in a 49-50 vote. GOP unease grows as high gas prices and constitutional concerns mount ahead of November elections.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Cheongung-II missile system confirmed in combat use against Iranian missiles
item.description: South Korean military officials confirmed the Cheongung-II surface-to-air missile system successfully intercepted Iranian ballistic missiles during the Middle East conflict, marking the first confirmed combat shootdown by a Korean weapons system.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia establishes full partnership with Afghan Taliban, urges regional cooperation
item.description: Russia is building a full-fledged partnership with Afghanistan's Taliban government, encouraging SCO members to expand cooperation with Kabul in security, trade, and humanitarian support.

item.title: ⚔️ US Army general: Industry surge and allied burden sharing essential for Indo-Pacific peace
item.description: Gen. Xavier Brunson emphasized that military strength, industrial sustainability, and allied collaboration are critical components to create a fortress chain of defense burden sharing in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: 🇰🇷 Samsung union threatens 18-day strike amid AI chip boom, sparking economic slowdown fears
item.description: Samsung Electronics largest union has threatened an 18-day walkout from May 21 to June 7, raising concerns about production disruptions and wider fallout across the global technology supply chain.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli strikes kill 12 in Lebanon ahead of US-mediated ceasefire talks
item.description: Israeli airstrikes hit cars on a highway south of Beirut, killing 12 people, as Lebanon and Israel prepare for a third round of Washington-mediated talks with their current ceasefire set to expire within days.

item.title: 🌍 Iran war devastates Middle East economies and upends regional security
item.description: The US-Israeli bombing campaign against Iran has damaged infrastructure across the region, exposed Gulf energy vulnerabilities, and overturned decades of assumptions about Middle East security architecture.

item.title: 🛡️ NATO eastern flank leaders call for consolidated air defenses after Russian violations
item.description: Leaders of 14 NATO allies on the eastern flank warned that repeated Russian airspace breaches underscore the urgent need to strengthen the alliance's air defense capabilities against missiles and drones.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi Warns Trump That Taiwan Could Push US-China Relations Into "Great Jeopardy"
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping issued a stark warning to President Trump during their Beijing summit, saying US-China relations could enter an "extremely dangerous place" if the Taiwan issue is not handled properly. The warning came as the leaders discussed trade and the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Says Ready to Repel New US Attack as Peace Talks Stall
item.description: Iran's military said it is trained and ready for any new US assault as President Trump predicted a "long talk" about the war during his China visit. Peace talks remain stalled with no breakthrough in sight.

item.title: 🇵🇭🏛️ Philippines seeks ICC suspect after Senate shootout chaos
item.description: Philippine authorities are hunting for Senator Ronald "Bato" dela Rosa wanted by the ICC after gunfire erupted at the Senate building where he had taken refuge. Marcos convened an emergency meeting.
